title: Wow Technology!
description:
A Technological combination of mods and Datapacks!



(Currently the Icon is being worked on)
body: This modpack has many (not so many) mods and datapacks that affect the world of minecraft in some way! such as: New tools, New machines, New metals, New ores, and even space! This modpack was not made to be serious so do not hate on the developers of the mods and datapacks or the modpack itself. This modpack is ment to appeal to the players of minecraft who enjoy tech mods. This modpack is not an optimization pack but rather a modpack with tech mods/datapacks. The purpose of this modpack is to appeal to the tech mod/datapack players. This modpack is not ment to be major and popular so I recommend checking it out before hating. The major datapacks in here are: Mechanization, The expansion and The creeper's code. You may find many other little and big datapacks around the modpack but this is not a vannila plus it is a tech modpack. (I will not be putting in creative tabs for the datapacks or the JEI mod in this) (This modpack is not ment to be a money farm or a full on focused project so do not expect updates often because this is a passion project not a genuine project) Credits due where credits due. Mod/datapack/resourcepack developers: Traben, Wisp Forest, Serilum, Ebluz, TimVinci, Socolio, Diesse, ThellusiveC4, KikuGie, Tr7zw, Superkat32, Modmuss50, Declipsonator, KawaMood, ICY105, Darkhax, Patbox, Creepermagnet_, VonLeipenstein, Tree Corp, henkelmax, Fuzs, Grend, LambdAroura, Sollace, Terraformers, jaredlll08, shedaniel, creativemd, FreshLX, Lopymine, Zsoltmolnarr, KosmX, BizCub, CesarZorak, digitalpear, Adubbz, MehVahdJukaar, Trivaxy, lunarburten. I made none of these Mods/Datapacks/Resourcepacks. Please go support all the developers on this list because without them this modpack would not have existed. REQUIRED FOR USAGE OF THE MODPACK: Go into the resource packs page in the settings and enable: the-expansion-v2.a-resourcpack, Mechanizationresourcepack, tcc_resourcepack_1.5. If for some reason nothing drops while mined just repair the modpack in the settings of the modpack. The modpack is currently VERY unoptimized. The modpack is playable but very laggy or buggy. Do not start a world before activating all the texturepacks (Not including the textruepacks minecraft included and Fresh animations) Expect lag when starting a world because the Expansion datapack has to load space and everything inside it so just wait until the message pops up.
